title: Foreign Exchange Turnover Data: March 30, 2026 – April 02, 2026
description: The Reserve Bank of India today released the data showing daily merchant and Inter-Bank transactions in foreign exchange for the period March 30, 2026 – April 02, 2026. All Figures are in USD Millions Position Date MERCHANT INTER BANK FCY / INR FCY / FCY FCY / INR FCY / FCY Spot Forward Cancellation of Forwards Spot Forward Cancellation of Forwards Spot Swap Forward Spot Swap Forward Purchases 30-03-2026 10,407 8,735 4,093 517 1,283 1,278 28,994 30,393 7,242 8,813 7,663 2,011 02-04-2026 10
